dashboard.title: Migration Assistant
dashboard.headline: Moving to Shopware
dashboard.information: First thing is to link up your existing shop system - the Migration Assistant will help you along the way.

disabledMessages.noPermission: You do not have the required permissions to perform a migration.
disabledMessages.noData: There is no data available for migration.
disabledMessages.truncatingMigration: Migration data is currently being truncated.
disabledMessages.noSelectedData: No items have been selected for migration.
disabledMessages.disabled: Migration is disabled in this environment.
disabledMessages.unfilledPremapping: Complete all required mappings before continuing.

introduction.title: Migration Assistant
introduction.contentInformation: Together we will connect your shop system to Shopware 6. Afterwards the Migration Assistant will help you to migrate your data step by step.

profileInstallation.title: Migration - Shopsystem-Profile
profileInstallation.content: Pick the shop system to migrate data from and be sure to install the corresponding profile plugin as well.

connectionCreate.title: Migration – Create new connection
connectionCreate.gatewayTooltip: The type of connection between the systems.
connectionCreate.connectionTooltip: Enter a unique name for the connection.

hint.local: Note: The shop systems have to be on the same server. You need access data to the database.

credentials.title: Migration – Establish a connection
credentials.emptyState: Sorry no form for selected profile found.

api.title: Connect your Shopware 5 store

steps.step1: Install and activate the plugin {pluginName} from your Shopware 5 backend under Plugin Manager > Extensions > Migration tools.
steps.step2: Go to User administration in your Shopware 5 backend.
steps.step3: Select the user you want to use for the connection.
steps.step5: Make sure the user has the role local_admin.
steps.step6: Enter the API credentials here to establish the connection.

api.apiKeyTooltip: The API key is used for security and identification.
api.endpointSSLLabel: My shop uses a secure connection (SSL)

api.title: Connect your Shopware 6 store

steps.step1: Install and activate the {pluginName} extension on the source system.
steps.step2: Create an integration in the source system via Settings > System > Integrations.
steps.step3: Generate an access key ID and secret access key.
steps.step4: Enter the access keys and shop domain here to establish the connection.

api.apiPasswordTooltip: The secret access key is used for security and identification.
api.apiUserTooltip: Access key ID of your integration.
api.endpointSSLLabel: My shop uses a secure connection (SSL)
api.pluginLinkText: More about the Migration Assistant extension

success.undefinedErrorMsg: An unknown error occurred while checking the SSL certificate from the specified shop domain.
success.SWAG_MIGRATION__REQUEST_CERTIFICATE_INVA: We have determined that the SSL certificate of the specified shop domain is not secure. Check the certificate for your own security.

error.undefinedErrorMsg: Internal server error. Please try again.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__API_CONNECTION_ERROR: Could not connect to the server. Please check the given shop domain.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__API_CONNECTION_ERROR__HI: If you're having trouble connecting, it might be worth checking the currently installed curl version on your server and updating it.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__GATEWAY_READ: Could not connect to the server. Please check the given shop domain.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__GATEWAY_READ__HINT: If you're having trouble connecting, it might be worth checking the currently installed curl version on your server and updating it.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__INVALID_CONNECTION_CREDE: The access data for the connection to the source system do not exist or are incorrect. Please check them and try again.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__PLUGIN_NOT_INSTALLED: The required plugin “Migration Connector” is not installed in Shopware 5. Please install the free plugin and try again.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__PLUGIN_NOT_INSTALLED__HI: If you already installed the “Migration Connector” and cleared the cache in the Shopware 5 backend (Configuration > Cache/performance), try deleting your Shopware 5 cache folder (var/cache) manually.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__DATABASE_CONNECTION_ERRO: Database connection could not be established.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__DATABASE_CONNECTION_ATTR: Database connection does not have the right attributes and they can not be set.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__IS_RUNNING: A migration is currently in progress. Therefore, you cannot edit the credentials until the migration is complete.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__SSL_REQUIRED: We have determined that the given shop domain is required a SSL connection.
error.SWAG_MIGRATION__DUPLICATE_SOURCE_CONNECT: A connection to the same source system already exists. Please use another connection.

message.currency: A migration with different default currencies can lead to corrupted data records and cause unpredictable side effects.
message.language: A migration with different default languages can lead to corrupted data records and cause unpredictable side effects.

index.title: General
index.pluginVersionText: We have noticed that a plugin update is available in your source system {sourceSystem}. Please update the plugin "{pluginName}" before you start the migration.
index.shopwareMajorVersionText: We have noticed that your source system {sourceSystem} version does not match your target system {targetSystem} version. Please ensure to use the same major version for both systems before you start the migration.

isResettingChecksums.title: Resetting checksums
isResettingChecksums.message: The checksums are being reset. This may take a few minutes.

isTruncatingMigration.title: Truncating migration data
isTruncatingMigration.message: The migration data is being truncated. This may take a few minutes.

removeCredentialsConfirmDialog.title: Delete access data
removeCredentialsConfirmDialog.content: There will be no active connection after this. Enter your access data again to restore the connection.
removeCredentialsConfirmDialog.contentHint: Would you like to delete the current access data?

resetChecksumsConfirmDialog.title: Reset checksums
resetChecksumsConfirmDialog.content: Resetting the checksums will restore your source system to a state similar to that before the first migration attempt. If you decide to migrate again from it, any changes to the newer Shopware 6 target system that have been made in the meantime might be overwritten.
resetChecksumsConfirmDialog.contentHint: Do you want to reset the checksums?

resetMigrationConfirmDialog.title: Truncate migration
resetMigrationConfirmDialog.header: Are you done migrating your shop data?
resetMigrationConfirmDialog.content: If you have successfully migrated all of your shop data, go ahead and archive this migration. This will allow the system to clean up temporary files and unused data.

errorNotification.title: Error occurred while archiving the migration
errorNotification.message: A migration is currently in progress.

selectDataCard.noDataSubline: Please check your connection or try another profile.

currencyMismatch.title: Different default currencies detected
currencyMismatch.text: The default currencies of the source system [{sourceSystemCurrency}] and target system [{targetSystemCurrency}] do not match. The data can be migrated, but it is not converted automatically.

languageMismatch.title: Different default languages detected
languageMismatch.text: The default languages of the source system [{sourceSystemLanguage}] and target system [{targetSystemLanguage}] do not match. The data can be migrated, but it is not automatically assigned.

premappingCard.unfilledAlert: Manual assignment needed in order to proceed.

loadingScreenCard.notice: Tip: This process runs in the message queue. You don't need to stay on this page if your shop is configured correctly.

fetching.long: The data will be read from your system
fetching.caption: The new assignments are processed.

error-resolution.caption: The migration is paused until all errors are resolved.

writing.long: The data is being written in Shopware 6
writing.caption: Depending on the shop size it may take a few moments.

media-processing.caption: Large image data can take some time to process.

aborting.caption: Unwritten data is cleaned up. Already migrated data might be unusable.

cleanup.long: The migration is being cleaned up
cleanup.caption: Temporary data is being removed. The migration is almost complete.

indexing.long: The new data is being indexed
indexing.caption: The migration is almost complete.

result.title: The Migration is done
result.historyHint: You can view this information any time in the migration history.

codes.SWAG_MIGRATION_FETCH_ENTITY_COUNT_FAILED: Failed to read entity count from source system
codes.SWAG_MIGRATION_VALIDATION_OPTIONAL_FIELD: Optional field has an invalid value
codes.SWAG_MIGRATION_VALIDATION_REQUIRED_FIELD: Required field has an invalid value

errors.noLogsSelected: Please select at least one log entry to resolve.
errors.noEntityIdsFound: No valid entity IDs found in the selected log entries.

continue-modal.title: Continue
continue-modal.text-unfixable: There are {count} unfixable errors that are still unresolved. If you continue without solving the remaining errors, follow-up errors could appear.
continue-modal.text-fixable: There are {count} groups of fixable errors that are still unresolved. Please correct these errors before continuing to avoid follow-up errors.

header.title: Error resolution
header.description: Review and resolve migration errors that occurred during the import. Fix data issues directly in this view or download the log file for detailed information. Continue once all fixable errors are resolved. You can leave this view and come back to it later
header.continueTooltip: Please fix all fixable errors before continuing.

banner.title: Some errors are not fixable via this view
banner.content: There are {count} errors or warnings that can't be resolved from this screen. To investigate, download the log file and review the detailed error messages. The underlying issues may need to be fixed in the source system. Once resolved, re-run the migration to continue.

empty-state.headline: Nothing found
empty-state.description: No logs matching the selected filters were found.

banner.title: No option available
banner.content: Please create at least one option to select in the corresponding Administration area.

unhandledBanner.title: Unknown field type
unhandledBanner.content: The field type could not be determined. Please correct the raw source data. The value has to be in the correct format.

unresolvableBanner.title: This error currently cannot be resolved via the Migration Assistant
unresolvableBanner.content: Please check the log file for more information.

confirmAbortDialog.title: Stop migration
confirmAbortDialog.content: The migration is not fully complete. Already migrated data might be unusable. If you quit now, you will have to completely rerun the migration process.
confirmAbortDialog.hint: Do you want to stop the migration?

detailPage.title: Migration details
detailPage.noProgressData: This run was performed in a previous version of the plugin and its data has been deleted.

mediaProcessing.title: The media is being downloaded
mediaProcessing.message: No files remaining. | One file remaining. | {n} files remaining.
mediaProcessing.messageSuccess: The media download has been completed.

api-error.fetchConnectionId: Failed to get active connection ID.
api-error.checkConnection: Failed to check the connection to source system.
api-error.getDataSelection: Failed to get data selection for current connection.

error-codes.SWAG_MIGRATION_CONNECTION_NAME_TO_SHORT: The connection name must be at least 1 character long.
error-codes.SWAG_MIGRATION_INVALID_API_KEY: The API key does not have the correct length ({length}/40 characters).
